title: Lumina Domain Registry
description: Maps domain identifiers to their runtime configuration paths for multi-domain deployments.

unauthenticated_domain.description: Domain ID for unauthenticated (anonymous) sessions. When absent, falls back to default_domain. Must reference a key in 'domains'. Set to a welcome or landing domain pack to give guests a distinct entry point.

default_domain.description: Domain ID used as fallback for authenticated users when no role_default matches and NLP routing finds no confident match. Must reference a key in 'domains'.

role_defaults.description: Optional mapping of role name to domain_id. When NLP routing finds no confident match, authenticated users whose role appears here are routed to the specified domain instead of default_domain. Values must reference keys in 'domains'.

domains.description: Mapping of domain_id to domain entry.

runtime_config_path.description: Repo-relative path to the domain's runtime-config.yaml.

label.description: Human-readable display name for the domain.

description.description: Short description of the domain's purpose.

module_prefix.description: Short identifier that appears as the second path segment in module IDs (e.g. 'edu' in 'domain/edu/algebra-level-1/v1'). Used to infer the domain for admin users from their governed_modules JWT claim.

keywords.description: Keywords for semantic domain routing. Used to match user messages to this domain.
